title: Byblos Academy of Medicine
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The [[Byblos Academy of Medicine]] was a medical training school on [[Byblos/Legends|Byblos]]. Among the many physicians to graduate from the academy was [[Aurin Leith]].

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|10|Do No Harm|reprint=1}} {{Mo}}
